title: CRIME VICTIMS REPARATIONS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 21.  CRIME VICTIMS REPARATIONS

§1801.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the Crime Victims Reparations Act.  

Added by Acts 1982, No. 250, §1, eff. July 17, 1982.

CHAPTER 21.  CRIME VICTIMS REPARATIONS
§1801.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the Crime Victims Reparations Act.
Added by Acts 1982, No. 250, §1, eff. July 17, 1982.
